field.label: WAN Interface
field.help: Select the WAN interface where DPI bypass should be applied.

field.label: Ports
field.help: Comma-separated list of ports to intercept (default: 80,443).

field.label: Divert Port
field.help: Internal port for ipfw divert socket (default: 989). Change only if conflicting with another service.

field.label: How to find your strategy
field.text:
Run blockcheck2 from the Diagnostics page or via SSH:
cd /usr/local/etc/zapret2 && env IFACE_WAN=your_wan_if /bin/sh blockcheck2.sh

Copy the working strategy from the SUMMARY output into the fields below.
HTTP strategies go in the HTTP field, HTTPS/TLS strategies go in the HTTPS field.

field.label: HTTP Strategy
field.help:
dvtws2 arguments for HTTP (port 80) bypass from blockcheck2 results.
Paste the part after dvtws2 from a curl_test_http line in the SUMMARY.
Example: --payload=http_req --lua-desync=http_hostcase:spell=hoSt

field.label: HTTPS Strategy
field.help:
dvtws2 arguments for HTTPS/TLS (port 443) bypass from blockcheck2 results.
Paste the part after dvtws2 from a curl_test_https_tls12 line in the SUMMARY.
Example: --payload=tls_client_hello --lua-desync=fake:blob=fake_default_tls:ip_autottl=-4,3-20:repeats=1

field.label: Extra Arguments
field.help: Additional global dvtws2 arguments appended to the command line.

field.label: Host List Mode
field.help:
All traffic — apply DPI bypass to all traffic on configured ports.
Only listed domains — apply only to domains listed below.
Auto-detect — automatically detect and add blocked domains.

field.label: Domains
field.help: One domain per line. Only used when Host List Mode is set to "Only listed domains".

field.label: Exclude Domains
field.help:
Domains to exclude from DPI bypass (one per line). Traffic to these domains will pass through unmodified.
Use this if zapret2 breaks connectivity to specific sites (e.g. government portals, banking sites).
